hotspots.title: Trump’s WHCD evacuation after shooting
hotspots.blurb: A gunman attempted to assassinate President Trump during the White House Correspondents' Dinner, leading to his evacuation. The incident has sparked intense scrutiny over security failures and political violence.
hotspots.affect: This event commands disproportionate attention due to its high-stakes nature, involving an assassination attempt on a sitting U.S. president, which evokes fear, outrage, and moral panic.

hotspots.title: PP-Vox ‘national priority’ pacts in Spain
hotspots.blurb: Spain’s conservative People’s Party (PP) and far-right Vox have formed coalition agreements in Aragón and Extremadura, introducing policies that prioritize Spanish nationals in access to social services and housing. This has sparked controversy and legal debates.
hotspots.affect: The pacts are highly charged due to their exclusionary framing, moral panic over immigration, and polarized contention between left and right-wing factions in Spain.

hotspots.title: Orbán’s exit and Fidesz’s future in Hungary
hotspots.blurb: After 16 years in power, Viktor Orbán’s Fidesz party lost the Hungarian election to Péter Magyar’s Tisza Party. Orbán’s allies are reportedly moving assets abroad, and Fidesz is undergoing internal restructuring.
hotspots.affect: This hotspot is charged due to Orbán’s polarizing legacy, the dramatic shift in Hungarian politics, and fears of asset flight and authoritarian backsliding.

hotspots.title: AfD’s rise and democratic backlash in Germany
hotspots.blurb: Germany’s far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) has surged in polls, becoming the strongest party in some regions. This has sparked protests, legal challenges, and debates over democratic norms.
hotspots.affect: The AfD’s rise is highly charged due to its extremist rhetoric, fears of democratic erosion, and polarized contention between mainstream parties and the far-right.

hotspots.title: Meloni’s global stance amid Trump tensions
hotspots.blurb: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni has faced criticism for her handling of relations with Donald Trump, particularly over NATO tensions and Italy’s stance on the Iran war. Her government has also been embroiled in domestic controversies, including the firing of a conductor linked to her party.
hotspots.affect: This hotspot is charged due to Meloni’s polarizing leadership, Italy’s shifting foreign policy, and internal coalition tensions with the Lega party.
